---
title: "Gallery"
description: "How people are using EpiAware and the tools it builds on."
toc: false
---

Analyses, models, and outbreak responses built with EpiAware and the tools it
grows out of. While the Julia packages mature, these show the kind of work the
ecosystem is designed for. Used the tools yourself? [Add your
work](#add-your-work).

::: {.gallery-grid}

::: {.gallery-card}
[![](https://opengraph.githubassets.com/epiaware/epiforecasts/EpiNow2){fig-alt="EpiNow2"}](https://github.com/epiforecasts/EpiNow2)

::: {.gallery-body}
### Real-time outbreak analysis
Estimating reproduction numbers, growth rates, and nowcasts from delayed,
right-truncated data with EpiNow2 — used by public health teams internationally.

[EpiNow2 ↗](https://github.com/epiforecasts/EpiNow2)
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
[![](https://opengraph.githubassets.com/epiaware/epinowcast/epinowcast){fig-alt="epinowcast"}](https://github.com/epinowcast/epinowcast)

::: {.gallery-body}
### Nowcasting incident cases
Correcting for reporting delays in real time with epinowcast, the partner
community whose methods EpiAware brings to Julia.

[epinowcast ↗](https://www.epinowcast.org)
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
[![](https://opengraph.githubassets.com/epiaware/seabbs/a-workflow-for-infectious-disease-modelling){fig-alt="A workflow for infectious disease modelling"}](https://github.com/seabbs/a-workflow-for-infectious-disease-modelling)

::: {.gallery-body}
### A modelling workflow
An end-to-end workflow for infectious disease modelling — the approach the
composable components are built to support.

[View the workflow ↗](https://github.com/seabbs/a-workflow-for-infectious-disease-modelling)
:::
:::

::: {.gallery-card}
[![](https://opengraph.githubassets.com/epiaware/epiforecasts/scoringutils){fig-alt="scoringutils"}](https://github.com/epiforecasts/scoringutils)

::: {.gallery-body}
### Forecast evaluation
Scoring and comparing probabilistic forecasts with scoringutils, part of the
same toolset for real-time analysis.

[scoringutils ↗](https://github.com/epiforecasts/scoringutils)
:::
:::

:::

## Add your work {#add-your-work}

Used EpiAware, CensoredDistributions.jl, or another package for an analysis or
model? Share it on the [epinowcast forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/) or
open a pull request adding a card here — a short description, a link, and it goes
a long way.
